steps.detail: Successfully navigated to http://localhost:5173 and page loaded with title 'Engineer Brain'
Sidebar navigation verified - 7 navigation items found (Dashboard, Cases, Todo, Agents, Drafts, Issues, Settings)
Clicked 'Cases' nav item and navigated to /cases page with active cases table displayed (15 active cases)
Case list table visible with case cards showing case IDs, severity, status, titles, and action buttons
Clicked 'Issues' nav item and navigated to /issues page with issues list displayed (112 issues total)
Issues list visible with issue cards showing issue IDs, types, statuses, and descriptions
Clicked 'Dashboard' nav item and navigated back to / page with dashboard stats and overview cards
Dashboard stats visible: 15 Total Active, 7 SLA At Risk, 1 Needs My Action, 13 Awaiting Others; charts and metrics displayed
